S.FORM: masaatiladay a punu' nikaudipдәәз”ҹзҡ„жҷәж…§зөҗжҷ¶ maedeng tu nikaudip nu punu' anisa atilad.зңӢйҖҸдәәз”ҹзҡ„жҷәж…§зөҗжҷ¶
S.PHON: masaatir~Йҫadaj a punuК”~КЎ nikaudip******* maЙҷdЙҷЕӢ tu nikaudip nu punuК”~КЎ anisa atir~Йҫad.*********

S.PHON: masaatir~Йҫadaj a punuК”~КЎ nikaudip******* maЙҷdЙҷЕӢ tu nikaudip nu punuК”~КЎ anisa atir~Йҫad.*********
